/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/mks_run.dir/main.c.o CMakeFiles/mks_run.dir/Lexer/lexer.c.o CMakeFiles/mks_run.dir/Parser/AST.c.o CMakeFiles/mks_run.dir/Parser/parser_core.c.o CMakeFiles/mks_run.dir/Parser/parser_expr.c.o CMakeFiles/mks_run.dir/Parser/parser_stmt.c.o CMakeFiles/mks_run.dir/Eval/eval.c.o CMakeFiles/mks_run.dir/Runtime/value.c.o CMakeFiles/mks_run.dir/env/env.c.o CMakeFiles/mks_run.dir/Runtime/output.c.o CMakeFiles/mks_run.dir/Runtime/operators.c.o CMakeFiles/mks_run.dir/Utils/hash.c.o CMakeFiles/mks_run.dir/Runtime/functions.c.o CMakeFiles/mks_run.dir/Runtime/indexing.c.o CMakeFiles/mks_run.dir/Runtime/methods.c.o CMakeFiles/mks_run.dir/Runtime/control_flow.c.o CMakeFiles/mks_run.dir/GC/gc.c.o -o mks_run  -lm
